title: Luxury Yacht Broker
description: Sell the dream lifestyle. We are Thailand's premier yacht brokerage, looking for experienced sales professionals to handle high-net-worth clients.
requirements: 5+ years in luxury sales (cars, watches, or real estate)
Understanding of maritime industry is a plus
responsibilities: Build and maintain relationships with UHNW clients
Facilitate yacht viewings and sea trials
Manage the entire sales process from inquiry to handover
Represent the brand at boat shows
